_meta.description: Singapore parenthood benefits — 2026. Figures VERIFIED against official government sources on 2026-07-01. Re-verify before each release; several figures changed on 1 Apr 2025 and 1 Apr 2026.
_meta.verifiedBy: manual (human review required before publishing any change)
_meta.warning: Do NOT auto-publish changes to this file. Financial guidance to parents must pass human review. See docs/RISK-AND-FEASIBILITY.md.

babyBonusCashGift.source: MSF Baby Bonus Scheme (confirm exact current schedule on official MSF page before release)

cdaFirstStepGrant.source: Large Families Scheme — Made for Families / LifeSG
cdaFirstStepGrant.note: 3rd+ raised to $10,000 for children born on/after 18 Feb 2025 (Large Families Scheme).

cdaCoMatchingCap.source: Secondary aggregators consistent with post-2023 enhancement; CONFIRM on official MSF Baby Bonus page before publishing
cdaCoMatchingCap.correctionFromPrompt: Prompt stated $4K/$7K/$9K/$15K — outdated. Current schedule is $6K/$12K/$18K.

medisaveGrantForNewborns.correctionFromPrompt: Prompt stated $4,000 — outdated. Enhanced to $5,000 for births on/after 1 Apr 2025.

largeFamiliesScheme.appliesTo: 3rd or subsequent Singapore Citizen child born on/after 2025-02-18
largeFamiliesScheme.source: Made for Families / LifeSG / CNA Budget 2025 (official)

paternityLeaveWeeks.correctionFromPrompt: Prompt stated 2 weeks — outdated. Government-Paid Paternity Leave is 4 weeks.

sharedParentalLeaveWeeks.correctionFromPrompt: Prompt stated 6 weeks (2025). Current entitlement is 10 weeks for children born on/after 1 Apr 2026.

medisaveMaternityPackage.correctionFromPrompt: Prompt muddled labels: it called $2,150 'assisted' (it is standard C-section) and $3,950 'C-section' (it is C-section WITH hysterectomy). Assisted vaginal delivery is $1,250.

parenthoodTaxRebate.source: IRAS — CONFIRM current schedule before release

workingMothersChildRelief.basis: Fixed-dollar for children born/adopted on/after 1 Jan 2024 (was % of income for older children).

firstYearsSupport._note: Ongoing support beyond birth. Verified 2026 against IRAS + Made for Families. Tax reliefs use fixed-dollar amounts for children born/adopted on/after 1 Jan 2024.

taxReliefs.name: Qualifying Child Relief (QCR)
taxReliefs.who: Either parent, per child ($7,500 if disabled)

taxReliefs.name: Grandparent Caregiver Relief (GCR)
taxReliefs.who: Working mother · grandparent cares for child ≤ 12

taxReliefs.name: Foreign Domestic Worker Levy Relief
taxReliefs.who: Working mother employing a helper (2× the levy)

childcare.name: Childcare subsidy (18 mo–P1)
childcare.who: Basic subsidy for all; more if working

notes: Baby Bonus Cash Gift is paid in instalments until your child is 6.5 years old.
The CDA closes at age 12; unused funds move to the Post-Secondary Education Account (PSEA).
Combined QCR + WMCR is capped at $50,000 per child; total tax reliefs cap at $80,000 per year.

sources.label: Made for Families — tax reliefs & rebates
